---
name: movement-memo
description: Use when drafting a valuation movement memo grounded in wiki and run outputs.
---

# Movement Memo Skill

Use this workflow after analysis and wiki curation.

1. Run `act memo --run-id <run_id>`.
2. Review `runs/<run_id>/memo.md`.
3. Ensure the memo references source files, validation status, and movement
   drivers from the provided bridge.
4. Keep review-required language in the memo.

Do not present the memo as final actuarial sign-off.
